entities.summary: Model configuration dataclass holding architecture hyperparameters

detail.name: Config
detail.description: Stores num_layers, hidden_size, num_heads, vocab_size etc. Loaded from HuggingFace config.json.

takeaway.explain: @dataclass holding all hyperparameters. Single source of truth. Loaded from JSON/YAML. Passed to all components that need config.
takeaway.rationale: Stores num_layers, hidden_size, num_heads, vocab_size etc
takeaway.cross_lang: Kotlin data class, Rust config struct with serde, Go struct with json tags, TypeScript zod schema
takeaway.gotcha: Nested mutable defaults are shared across instances — always use field(default_factory=...)

takeaway.explain: Architecture defined by data (config.json), not hard-coded. Same code runs different model sizes by changing config.
takeaway.rationale: Stores num_layers, hidden_size, num_heads, vocab_size etc
takeaway.cross_lang: Java Spring @ConfigurationProperties, Rust config crate, Go viper, TypeScript dotenv + zod
takeaway.gotcha: Config sprawl — too many knobs makes system impossible to understand. Provide sensible defaults
